templates: The past stirs — {entity} lingers in the dust of forgotten halls.
History does not forgive. {entity} is proof enough.
They spoke of {entity} once, in rooms much like this one.
Time bends around {entity}, as if reluctant to let go.
The echo of {entity} carries further than any spell.
{entity}. The dungeon has been holding that name since before you were born.
What happened to {entity} happened here first. The dungeon keeps the original copy.
History is written by survivors. {entity} was not one of them. The dungeon keeps the other version.
The archive below contains everything about {entity} that was deemed too dangerous for the surface.
{entity} shaped what came after. You are part of what came after. The lineage is longer than you think.
Something in the lower levels remembers {entity} directly. Not from records. From experience.
The name {entity} has been spoken in this dungeon before. By seekers who did not return. By things that are not seekers.
